lines: France, Norway, and Argentina all won last night, meaning Callum is sitting pretty on 16 points like the smug cunt he is — France AND Norway both banging in goals while the rest of you scramble around in the dirt.
Ellis, you beautiful anomaly — Argentina make it two from two and your sweepstake is quietly looking dangerous, don't let it go to your head love.

Dene is in absolute freefall: France beat Iraq 3-0 which sounds great until you remember his Senegal side just got twatted by Norway, his Tunisia are bottom of Group F with zero points, and Bosnia are barely breathing in Group B — mate, you're on 7 points and your entire portfolio is on fire.

Today's big one is Portugal vs Uzbekistan in Group K — Butters desperately needs Ronaldo's lot to stop drawing shit games and start winning, while Croft would love nothing more than an Uzbekistan miracle to absolutely ruin him.

Also keep your eyes on Panama vs Croatia in Group L — Al owns BOTH teams which sounds clever until you realise they've both lost their openers and he's somehow found a way to back two different losers simultaneously, absolute bellend.
